substep.title: Dispatch Codebase Children Against the Clone
substep.action:
Decompose the study topic into focused questions and dispatch the read-only codebase children against the clone path (.extern/{org-repo}/), per references/research/child-subagent-dispatch.md: - codebase-pattern-finder — find the implementation(s) of the pattern under study, with concrete code examples - codebase-analyzer — deep dive on how a specific component works - codebase-locator — find where relevant files live
Dispatch independent questions in one parallel message. Each prompt scopes the child to the clone path and carries the study question alone — never the parent task's intent. Instruct each child to cite clone-relative file:line (e.g., .extern/{org-repo}/src/foo.ts:42).

substep.title: Validate Returns and Sharpen-Redispatch
substep.action: Redispatch any vague return with a sharper prompt before synthesis. A "pattern not present in this repo" return is a genuine finding — the repo may not implement what we hoped; keep it and report it honestly in step 4.
